login.title: Sign in to Stikup
login.subtitle: Welcome back — pick your method below.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Free to join — your first 3 stickers are on us.
register.error_conflict: An account with that email already exists.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.sent_message: If an account with that email exists, we'll send a reset link. Check your inbox.

login_failed.title: Sign-in failed
login_failed.body: We couldn't complete the sign-in. This can happen if you denied access or the link expired.

hero.description: One selfie. Twelve cartoon stickers. Yours forever — installed straight into Telegram by our bot. No artists. No prompts.

how_it_works.title: Three steps.
how_it_works.description: The whole flow is built for one-handed mobile use — because that's where Telegram lives.

steps.step_01_body: Open @stikup_bot and tap /start. We send you a one-tap link straight into the app — no passwords.
steps.step_02_body: Front-facing photo, good light, one face. We check it instantly and tell you if anything looks off.
steps.step_03_body: Your full pack of 12 generates upfront. Take the 3 free ones — or pay once to unlock all 12 and have the bot install it.

pack_showcase.title: Here's what you actually get.
pack_showcase.description: Every pack is 12 stickers, generated from one photo. You see all 12 right away — 3 are free to take, 9 stay locked until you unlock the pack.

bullets.b2: Real Telegram sticker set you own
bullets.b4: Pay once to unlock all 12, no subscription
bullets.b5: One regeneration included with every paid pack

items.ready_body: Synchronous flow. Watch your pack come to life while you wait.
items.likeness_body: Tight prompts + a forgiving cartoon style so people actually recognise you.
items.telegram_body: Created under your Telegram account. Yours forever. Install with one tap.
items.download_body: Grab the WebPs or PNGs and use them anywhere — TikTok, IG, Discord, you name it.

pricing.title: One pack. One price.
pricing.description: Try the 3-sticker preview free. Pay once to unlock the full pack — keep it forever.
pricing.regional_pricing: Regional pricing — pay in your own currency.
pricing.payment_methods: Stripe · Apple Pay · Google Pay · CIS, EU, US currency support

bullets.b2: Real Telegram sticker set you own
bullets.b5: Bot delivers it for you in seconds
bullets.b6: No watermark. No subscription. No catch.

items.a1: You message our Telegram bot. It opens a webpage where you upload one selfie. About 1–3 minutes later, you see all 12 stickers — 3 are free to take, and the other 9 are visibly locked. Pay once to unlock the whole pack and the bot installs it to your Telegram.
items.a2: All 12 stickers unlock instantly — no second wait. The bot creates a real Telegram sticker set you own and DMs you the install link. You also get one regeneration of that pack in case the result isn't quite right.
items.q3: Can I make more than one pack?
items.a3: Yes — each pack is a separate purchase. After your first paid pack, you can upload a new photo and run the flow again. No subscription, no surprise charges.
items.a4: Stored only while your account exists. Delete your account from settings — the photo, the pack, the generated files all cascade out. GDPR-ready from day one.
items.q5: Why are 9 stickers locked instead of just hidden?
items.a5: So you can see exactly what you'd be unlocking. The locked previews are the real generated stickers — visible, with a small lock badge on top. Paying flips the badge off and installs all 12 to your Telegram, no second AI call.

final_cta.description: One selfie. We do the rest. Sticker pack waiting in your Telegram.

pack_list.make_another_body: Different photo. Fresh 12 stickers. One payment.

empty_state.title: No sticker packs yet
empty_state.body: You haven't made a sticker pack yet. Drop a selfie to begin.

account_row.delete_body: Cascading delete — your packs, stickers, and uploaded photo all removed. GDPR-compliant.

intro.title: Drop in one photo.
intro.description: Front-facing, well-lit, one face in frame. We'll handle the rest.

drop_zone.title: Drop a selfie or tap to pick
drop_zone.formats: JPEG · PNG · HEIC · up to 10 MB

tips.free_preview_body: Your full pack of 12 generates upfront. After you see it, you decide whether to take the 3 free, unlock all 12, or regenerate.
tips.privacy_note: We never share or sell your photo. It's stored only while your account exists and removed instantly when you delete it.

error.invalid_format: Use a JPEG, PNG, or HEIC photo.
error.too_large: File is over 10 MB. Try a smaller export.

header.title: Your sticker pack is alive.
header.description: All 12 generated. 3 free, 9 unlock with the pack.

sticker_grid.locked_note: Locked stickers are real — they're already generated. Unlock instantly reveals all 9 with no second wait.

preview_panel.tap_to_preview: Tap a sticker to preview it large

bullets.b1: All 12 stickers — locked ones reveal instantly
bullets.b2: Bot installs the Telegram pack for you

quota.title: Quota
quota.note: Each paid pack grants you a fresh cycle: new photo, 12 new stickers, 1 more regen.

delete_account.section_description: Cascading delete — your packs, stickers, and uploads are removed. GDPR-compliant.
delete_account.signed_in_as: Signed in as {email}. This action is permanent.
delete_account.confirm_body: Your account, packs, stickers, and uploads will be removed and cannot be recovered.
delete_account.error_failed: Could not delete account. Please try again.

success.description: All 12 stickers installed under your Telegram account. Tap to add them to your sticker tray.
success.share_tiktok_body: Drop a sticker into a video and tag #stikup. Your pack travels.
success.invite_body: They make a paid pack → you get 2 bonus stickers added to yours.
success.make_another_body: Different photo, fresh 12 stickers. Single $5.99 — no subscription.
